sector.name_zh: 电路板与 PCB 标签
sector.subhead_en: Traceability labels matched to each PCB process — reflow, aggressive wash, finished-board and ESD-safe.
sector.subhead_zh: 按 PCB 工序匹配的可追溯标签 —— 回流焊、强力清洗、成品板与防静电。
sector.intro_en: PCB labels are organised into four processes. Pick the process, then the construction — 1 mil, 2 mil, ESD-safe or ultra heat-resistant. Each is available under three series: Polyonics APEX, Polyonics XF and E-Label — the same construction under each identity.
sector.intro_zh: PCB 标签分为四个工序。先选工序,再选构造 —— 1 mil、2 mil、ESD 防静电或超耐高温。每一款都提供三个系列:Polyonics APEX、Polyonics XF 与 E-Label —— 同一材料,三种标识。

processes.overview_en: The most demanding process: the label is applied to a bare or in-process board and passes through the reflow oven and aggressive aqueous wash — polyimide territory.
processes.overview_zh: 最苛刻的工序:标签贴在裸板或在制板上,穿过回流焊炉和强碱水洗,必须用聚酰亚胺
processes.challenge_en: Survive 260–330 °C multiple reflow passes and strong Kyzen/Zestron cleaning with no smearing or lifting, keeping small text and dense barcodes scannable.
processes.challenge_zh: 承受 260-330℃ 多次回流,以及 Kyzen/Zestron 强力清洗,印字不糊、标签不翘,小字与密集条码保持可读

products.spec_en: 1 mil gloss white PI; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant coating; no pre-heat; UL/MIL
products.spec_zh: 1mil 亮光白 PI;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗涂层;免预热;UL/MIL

products.spec_en: 2 mil heavy gloss white PI; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant topcoat; -70~100℃; UL/MIL
products.spec_zh: 2mil 加厚亮光白 PI;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗表层;-70~100℃;UL/MIL

products.spec_en: 1 mil highest-temp white specialty PI; 300 °C short-term; R4300 ribbon meets SAE AS81530; ultra-durable high-temp adhesive; dual-side
products.spec_zh: 1mil 最耐高温白色特种 PI;短时耐 300℃;R4300 碳带满足 SAE AS81530;超耐久高温胶;正反面通用

processes.overview_en: Applied after reflow; the board still goes through repeated aggressive washing but no longer sees reflow heat — the same materials as Wash & Reflow.
processes.overview_zh: 回流后贴,板子仍要过多次强力清洗,但不再经受回流热,与回流工序同款材料
processes.challenge_en: Withstand repeated aggressive washing and moderate heat with no pre-heat, keeping print legible — without paying for capability this process never uses.
processes.challenge_zh: 免预热下承受反复强力清洗和中等热,保持印字可读,不为用不到的能力买单

products.spec_en: 1 mil gloss white PI; dual ESD; reinforced wash-resistant coating; no pre-heat; UL/MIL
products.spec_zh: 1mil 亮光白 PI;双 ESD 防静电;强化耐洗涂层;免预热;UL/MIL

products.spec_en: 2 mil matte white PI; non-ESD; -70~100℃; UL/MIL; thermal transfer
products.spec_zh: 2mil 哑光白 PI;无 ESD;-70~100℃;UL/MIL;热转印

processes.overview_en: Applied after all soldering, cleaning and reflow — the final identity on a finished board or assembly. No reflow heat, so no need for 300 °C polyimide.
processes.overview_zh: 在所有焊接、清洗、回流完成后贴,成品板/组件的最终标识,不再需要极端耐热的聚酰亚胺
processes.challenge_en: Thin, low-cost and ESD-safe where needed — without over-engineering with heat resistance the process never uses.
processes.challenge_zh: 薄、低成本,需要时 ESD 安全,不为用不到的耐热能力买单

products.spec_en: 2 mil flame-retardant polyester; UL94 V-0, self-extinguishing; battery-safe
products.spec_zh: 2mil 阻燃聚酯;UL94 V-0 阻燃、自熄;电池环境安全

products.spec_en: 2 mil ESD polyester; static-dissipative, medical-grade, permanent; gloss white; -40~180℃; UL 969
products.spec_zh: 2mil ESD 聚酯;防静电、医疗级、永久;光面白;-40~180℃;UL 969

products.spec_en: 1 mil ultra-thin polyester; compact, cost-optimised, for micro devices; -40~85℃
products.spec_zh: 1mil 超薄聚酯;超薄微型、成本优化、微型设备专用;-40~85℃

processes.material_zh: 静电耗散聚酰亚胺 / 聚酯
processes.overview_en: Dedicated static-dissipative line for static-sensitive assemblies: surface resistance 10⁹–10¹¹ Ω and low-charging PSA under 125 V. See the full ESD-Safe page for standards and compliance.
processes.overview_zh: 面向静电敏感组件的专用静电耗散产品线:表面电阻 10⁹–10¹¹ Ω,低电荷压敏胶低于 125 V 详见 ESD-Safe 专页的标准与合规
processes.challenge_en: Dissipate charge from human contact (HBM) and charged devices (CDM) without a hard short, and stay compliant to ANSI/ESD S20.20 through reflow, wash and handling.
processes.challenge_zh: 耗散人体接触（HBM）与带电器件（CDM）静电而不造成硬短路,并在回流、清洗与操作全程符合 ANSI/ESD S20.20

products.spec_en: 1 mil polyimide; semi-gloss white; static-dissipative; 100 hrs @ 150 °C · 5 min @ 260 °C · 90 sec @ 300 °C
products.spec_zh: 1mil 聚酰亚胺;半光白;静电耗散;150 °C 100 小时 · 260 °C 5 分钟 · 300 °C 90 秒

products.spec_en: 2 mil polyimide; semi-gloss white; static-dissipative; UL 969 recognized
products.spec_zh: 2mil 聚酰亚胺;半光白;静电耗散;UL 969 认证

products.spec_en: 2 mil polyester; gloss white; static-dissipative; operating −40 to 204 °C
products.spec_zh: 2mil 聚酯;光面白;静电耗散;工作温度 −40 至 204 °C
